memoryArtifacts.description: Joan Doan was born in 1540 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England. She married Henry Goode in 1560 in her hometown. They had two children during their marriage. She died as a young mother in 1571 at th …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Doane於1540年出生在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特時，她的父親John Downe15歲，母親Maria Phillips15歲。她於1564年3月30日與Henry Goode在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1571年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾阿爾享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Doane于1540年出生在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特时，她的父亲John Downe15岁，母亲Maria Phillips15岁。她于1564年3月30日与Henry Goode在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1571年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾阿爾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Doane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubháin ‘descendant of Dubhán’, meaning ‘the little black one’, a common name in the 16th century in southern Ireland, or Ó Damháin ‘descendant of Damhán’ meaning ‘fawn, little stag’, a rare Ulster name. See also Devine .

variants.name: Dwan
meanings: Irish (Tipperary and Offaly): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubháin or Ó Damháin (see Doane ).

variants.name: Duane
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubháin or Ó Damháin (see Doane ).

variants.name: Doan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Duc, Minh, Trung, Vinh, Dung, Huong, Quang, Khanh, Long, Tan, Hong, Hang, Chan, Chien, Han, Man, Chi, Chin, Dong, Lung, Mija, Ming.
Vietnamese (Đoàn): from the Chinese surname 段, see Duan 1 and 4 below.

variants.name: Devine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brennan, Cormac, Donal, Finbar, Seamus, Conan, John Patrick, Padraic, Patrick Michael.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of either of two Gaelic names, Ó Duibhín ‘descendant of Duibhín’, a byname meaning ‘little black one’, or Ó Daimhín ‘descendant of Daimhín’, a byname meaning ‘little stag, little ox’. These are attenuated versions of Ó Dubháin and Ó Damháin, and are the phonetic origin of Anglicized forms with an internal v (as opposed to w, as in Dewan , or monosyllabic forms with an o or u) (see Doane ). Compare Devin 1.
English, Irish, and French: variant of   Devin   2.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Doane was born in 1540, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, her father, John Downe, was 15 and her mother, Maria Phillips, was 15. She married Henry Goode on 30 March 1564, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1571, in Arley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Doane est née en 1540, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Downe, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Maria Phillips, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Goode le 30 mars 1564, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1571, à Arley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Doane 1540 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Downe 15 und ihre Mutter Maria Phillips 15. Sie hat am 30. März 1564 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England Henry Goode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1571 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Arley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Doane è nata il nel 1540 nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John Downe, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Maria Phillips, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Henry Goode il 30 marzo 1564, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1571, nel Arley, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Doaneが1540年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで生まれた時，父John Downeは15歳，母Maria Phillipsは15歳であった。1564年3月30日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでHenry Goodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1571年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアアルリーで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Doane(이)가 1540년 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Downe(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Phillips(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1564년 3월 30일 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Henry Goode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 알리에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Doane nasceu em 1540, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Downe, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Maria Phillips, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Goode em 30 de março de 1564, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1571, em Arley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Doane родилась в 1540 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Downe было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Phillips, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Goode 30 марта 1564 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1571 г. в местности арли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Doane nació en 1540, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Downe, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Maria Phillips, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Henry Goode el 30 de marzo de 1564, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1571, en Arley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años.
